center.description: Alerts generated automatically from your transactions, debts, and habits. You can dismiss them; they will return next period if the risk persists.
center.emptyDescription: When we detect financial risks, they will appear here.

messages.critical-balance: Critical balance: this month's spending exceeds your allocated income.
messages.spending-pace-critical: 95% or more of your income is already committed to expenses this month.
messages.category-excess: Overspend in "{{categoryName}}": {{percent}}% of this month's expenses.
messages.upcoming-debt-payments: Upcoming payments: {{count}} debt(s) with minimum payments of ~{{totalMin}} this month.
messages.low-savings: Low savings: less than 5% of your income remains available this month.
messages.credit-limit-critical: Card {{cardName}} at {{usagePercent}}%: risk of hitting the credit limit.
messages.credit-usage-high: Aggregate credit utilization at {{usagePercent}}%. Consider reducing charges.
messages.category-spike: Risky pattern: "{{categoryName}}" grew {{growthPercent}}% vs last month.
messages.micro-spend-alert: Small purchases adding up: {{count}} micro-transactions ({{sharePercent}}% of spending).
